headline: The Bull Case For TE Connectivity (TEL) Could Change Following Record Q2 EPS Beat And Broad-Based Growth
summary: In the past quarter, TE Connectivity reported Q2 net sales growth of 14.5% year over year and a near 24% increase in adjusted EPS to a record US$2.73, surpassing analyst expectations with both Industrial and Transportation segments contributing. This combination of broad-based revenue expansion and record profitability highlights how TE Connectivity’s diversified end-market exposure can amplify earnings strength when demand improves. With adjusted EPS reaching a record US$2.73, we'll...
